summary: Completed testing of user comparison features for percentile ranking. All backend tests pass (23/23). Frontend correctly shows comparison section with percentile bars, rank labels, comparison insight in Hebrew, and week distribution chart when user has data. Section correctly hides when user has no weekly activity.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Backend /api/orientation/compare/{user_id} returns all required fields: direction_percentiles, dominant_direction, dominant_percentile, comparison_insight, week_comparison
GOOD: direction_percentiles array contains objects with direction, user_count, percentile, rank_label fields
GOOD: Percentile calculation correctly compares user to all other users with activity in each direction
GOOD: Rank labels correctly map to percentile ranges (עליון 10%, עליון 25%, מעל הממוצע, פעיל)
GOOD: comparison_insight generated in Hebrew with context-specific messages
GOOD: week_comparison dictionary shows user's distribution as percentages summing to 100%
GOOD: Frontend conditionally renders comparison section only when comparisonData.total_user_actions > 0
GOOD: Frontend displays percentile bars with visual representation of ranking
GOOD: Frontend shows small compass indicator with dominant direction
GOOD: Frontend displays week distribution mini-chart with color-coded bars
GOOD: data-testid attributes present for user-comparison-section and comparison-insight
seed_data_creation: Created test user 'test_comparison_user_ui_test' with 5 actions (3 recovery, 2 contribution) for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: User comparison feature fully tested. The comparison section conditionally displays when user has weekly activity (total_user_actions > 0). When no data, shows Hebrew message 'אין מספיק נתונים השבוע. בצע פעולות כדי להשוות את עצמך לאחרים.' Test user 'test_comparison_user_ui_test' created in database for UI testing. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_user_comparison.py.

frontend_tests.user_comparison_section_hidden_when_no_d: PASS - correctly hides for anonymous user
frontend_tests.user_comparison_section_visible_with_dat: PASS - shows for test user with 5 actions
frontend_tests.percentile_bars_displayed: PASS - recovery and contribution bars visible
frontend_tests.comparison_insight_displayed: PASS - 'אתה מעל הממוצע במיקוד על התאוששות.'

user_with_data.comparison_insight: אתה מעל הממוצע במיקוד על התאוששות.

user_without_data.comparison_insight: אין מספיק נתונים השבוע. בצע פעולות כדי להשוות את עצמך לאחרים.
